title: Add analytics dashboard
original_text: Implemented comprehensive analytics dashboard. Added real-time metrics visualization. Implemented custom report builder. Added data export functionality (CSV, PDF, Excel). Implemented drill-down capabilities for detailed analysis. Added scheduled report generation. Added role-based access to analytics. Added performance optimization for large datasets. Result: dashboard operational.
expected_body_lines: - Add data export functionality (CSV, PDF, Excel)
- Add scheduled report generation and RBAC
expected_command: git commit -m "feat(analytics): add comprehensive analytics dashboard"
